phases.name: decompose
phases.instruction: Break the goal into sub-tasks. Identify which agent types are needed. Consider dependencies.

phases.name: discover_roles
phases.instruction: Before dispatching, call list_roles to see which roles are available. If no role fits the required capability, use ask_user to request one — do not guess a role_id.

phases.name: dispatch
phases.instruction: Queue sub-tasks to appropriate agents using confirmed role IDs from list_roles. Set clear goals and constraints for each.

phases.name: monitor
phases.instruction: Track sub-task progress. Identify blockers. Re-prioritize if needed.

phases.name: synthesize
phases.instruction: Collect results from sub-tasks. Resolve conflicts. Produce unified output.

success_criteria: All sub-tasks complete successfully. Results are synthesized into a coherent answer. Dependencies are properly managed.
escalation_triggers: A sub-task fails with 'Role resolution failed' — call list_roles then ask_user if no suitable role exists
